info.name: DokaniAI API Collection
info.description:
AI Business Assistant for Bangladeshi Micro Shop Keepers

## Authentication
Most endpoints require JWT authentication. Use the Login endpoint to obtain an access token.

## Base URL
{{baseUrl}}/api/v1

## Environment Variables
- baseUrl: http://localhost:8081
- accessToken: (obtained from login)
- refreshToken: (obtained from login)
- businessId: UUID from business creation
- customerId: UUID from customer creation
- productId: UUID from product creation

item.name: Authentication

request.description: Register a new user with phone number. OTP will be sent to the phone for verification.
Register a new user with email and password, then verify via email token/OTP.
Verify OTP sent to phone number during registration or login.
Use this right after Verify Phone OTP (while access token is present) to set an initial password for future /auth/login requests.
Login with phone number and password. Returns access and refresh tokens.
Refresh access token using refresh token.
Get all active sessions for the authenticated user.

item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, and session management.

request.description: Parse Bengali voice command into structured data using AI.

Step 1 of two-step execution. For financial actions, API returns application error code `CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED` and a confirmation token payload. Save `error.details.confirmationToken` as `{{confirmationToken}}` for Step 2.

item.name: Parse & Execute - Step 2 (Financial with confirmationToken + idempotencyKey)

request.description: Step 2 of two-step financial execution. Re-sending same idempotency key may return a duplicate-command error.

request.description: Low-risk execution path (QUERY, EXPENSE). Quota/token overages are returned as HTTP 429 with `QUOTA_EXCEEDED` or `TOKEN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED`.
